✦ Your Personalized Toolkit
Ready to see your numbers?
The examples above are based on sample data. When you sign up, each tool asks you a short set of personalized questions — your scores, your debt, your goals — and generates results that are unique to you.

↻ Retake quiz with different answers

Platform

The decisions that define your career come down to a few questions.

Built by a physician to help you answer them with clarity, strategy, and real data.

Q1
What are my chances — and what do I do if I don't match?
Know where you stand, what moves the needle, and how to come back stronger if it doesn't go your way.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"You have a 62% probability of matching into Internal Medicine based on current metrics. Your biggest limiting factor is lack of U.S. clinical experience. Improving this alone could increase your odds by ~15–20%. If you didn't match this cycle, a focused 12-month plan targeting these gaps could move your probability to ~65% for the next."
🎯

Q2
What should I do with my career?
Figure out if you're on the right path, or if it's time to pivot.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"Based on your priorities — lifestyle, income ceiling, and procedural interest — Gastroenterology and Interventional Cardiology are your strongest fits. Nephrology scored lowest due to salary-to-training mismatch."
🧬

🔬

Career Roadmap Tool

Q3
Where do I stand right now — and what do I need to fix?
Get an honest breakdown of your profile and gaps.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"Your board scores are above average, but your research portfolio is your weakest dimension — 2 publications vs. a benchmark of 5+ for your target specialty. This is the single biggest gap to close before application season."
🎯
Match Probability Calculator
Preview →
📊
Research Impact Calculator
Preview →
📋
Strategic Application Review
Preview →
Q4
What will my financial future actually look like?
Understand income, debt, and long-term wealth before you commit.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"At your current trajectory — $62K resident salary, $280K in loans, and no PSLF enrollment — you'll reach positive net worth at age 41. Enrolling in PSLF today and maintaining income-driven repayment could accelerate that by 4 years."
📈
Financial Planner
Preview →
💰
RVU Compensation Calculator
Preview →
Q5
How do I make the right high-stakes decisions?
Avoid costly mistakes in contracts, jobs, and career moves.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"Your contract has a 25-mile non-compete and no tail coverage provision. If you leave within 3 years, you'd owe an estimated $38K in malpractice tail and be locked out of every hospital within 25 miles. These are negotiable — most candidates don't ask."
📄
Contract & Offer Analyzer
Preview →
💰
RVU Compensation Calculator
Preview →
Q6
How do I actually get opportunities?
Turn effort into interviews, observerships, and real traction.
▸
✦ Sample Insight
"You mentioned wanting cardiology — but you have zero U.S. clinical experience. We found 12 observership programs accepting IMG applicants in your target region, 3 with visa sponsorship. Start with these before application season."
🔍

Meet the Founder

Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC
Interventional Cardiologist · Founder of HeartWise
🗽 NYC-Trained Physician 🏥 Former Chief Resident / Fellow 📍 Interventional Cardiologist — Houston, TX 📊 Over a decade of mentorship experience
The Journey

I went through every stage of training: medical school, residency, chief resident, cardiology fellowship, chief fellow, interventional fellowship, and now attending practice.

At every step, the biggest decisions weren't clinical — they were career decisions.

  • • What specialty to choose
  • • How competitive I actually was
  • • Which opportunities mattered
  • • What contracts were worth signing
  • • How to think about money early

Most of the time, I was guessing — or relying on fragmented advice from people who meant well but didn't have the full picture.

Along the way, I watched talented physicians make avoidable mistakes. Not matching because they didn't know how to position themselves. Choosing the wrong path. Signing bad contracts. Entering practice with no financial strategy. Not because they weren't capable — but because there was no structured way to think through these decisions.

HeartWise was built to fix that.

Every tool is based on real decisions I've made, physicians I've mentored, or mistakes I've watched others make. This isn't generic advice — it's a system to help you think clearly when it actually matters.

Legal

Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Disclaimer

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 29, 2026

By accessing or using HeartWise ("the Platform"), operated by HeartWise Mentor LLC ("Company"), you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

1. Nature of the Service

HeartWise is an educational career intelligence platform for physicians, medical students, residents, and fellows. It is not a medical practice, financial advisory service, or law firm.

2. Not Professional Advice

HeartWise does not provide medical, legal, financial, tax, or investment advice. All content is for educational purposes only. AI outputs may contain errors. You are solely responsible for verifying information and consulting qualified professionals.

3. No Doctor-Patient Relationship

Use of the Platform does not create a doctor-patient relationship with HeartWise Mentor LLC, Dr. Mouzam Faroqui, or any reviewing physician. Physician reviews are educational opinions, not clinical advice or a standard of care.

4. Eligibility & Accounts

You must be 18+ to use HeartWise. One account per person; accounts are non-transferable. You are responsible for all activity under your credentials.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to: use the Platform unlawfully; reverse-engineer tools or algorithms; share credentials; submit harmful content; use bots or scrapers; disrupt infrastructure; or use outputs to develop competing products. Violations may result in immediate termination without refund.

6. Subscriptions & Payments

Paid plans bill on a recurring basis. Cancel any time; effective at end of billing period. No partial refunds. 48-hour trial is free, no credit card required, expires automatically. Pricing may change with 30 days' notice to existing subscribers.

7. User Content & Intellectual Property

You retain ownership of your content but grant us a license to process and store it to provide the Service. We may use de-identified, aggregated data for improvement. All HeartWise tools, frameworks, and branding are property of HeartWise Mentor LLC.

8. Disclaimer & Limitation of Liability

The Platform is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind. HeartWise Mentor LLC shall not be liable for any damages arising from use of the Platform, including career, financial, or clinical decisions. Total liability is limited to fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.

9. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify HeartWise Mentor LLC from claims arising from your use of the Platform, violation of these Terms, or decisions made based on Platform information.

10. Governing Law & Disputes

Governed by Texas law. Disputes resolved in Harris County, Texas courts. Class action waiver: all disputes resolved individually.

Full Terms of Service available after sign-in under Profile → Legal.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 29, 2026

Information We Collect

Account Info: Name, email, training stage, specialty, institution, goals. Usage Data: Questions, tools used, interaction patterns. Technical Data: Browser type, device info, general location.

How We Use It

To provide and personalize the service, generate AI guidance, facilitate physician reviews, process payments, send service updates, and improve the Platform through anonymized analytics.

Data Sharing

We do not sell your data. We share only with: service providers (Stripe, Supabase, Vercel) as needed to operate; reviewing physicians in limited-identification format; and when required by law.

Your Rights

Access, update, or delete your data. Opt out of non-essential communications. Request data export. Contact us for any data inquiries.

Security

Data is stored with encryption in transit and at rest via Supabase (AWS). We implement industry-standard security but cannot guarantee absolute security.

Disclaimer

Last updated: March 29, 2026

Educational Purpose Only

All content is for informational and educational purposes only. No doctor-patient relationship is created. No guarantee of outcomes. AI may contain errors. Financial data are estimates. Always consult qualified professionals.

Contact

Email: heartwisementor@gmail.com

HeartWise Mentor LLC · Founded by Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC · Houston, Texas

At every step, the biggest decisions weren't clinical — they were career decisions. What specialty to choose. How competitive I actually was. Which opportunities mattered. What contracts were worth signing. How to think about money early.

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 29, 2026

By accessing or using HeartWise ("the Platform"), operated by HeartWise Mentor LLC ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"), you ("User," "you," or "your") agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

1. Nature of the Service

HeartWise is an educational career intelligence platform designed for physicians, medical students, residents, and fellows. The Platform provides structured decision-making tools, career analytics, financial modeling frameworks, and AI-assisted strategic guidance. HeartWise is not a medical practice, staffing agency, recruiting firm, financial advisory service, or law firm.

2. Not Professional Advice

HeartWise does not provide medical, legal, financial, tax, or investment advice. All content, tools, AI-generated responses, and frameworks are for educational and informational purposes only. You should consult qualified professionals — including physicians, attorneys, financial advisors, and tax professionals — for individualized guidance specific to your situation.

AI-generated outputs are computational frameworks, not personalized recommendations. They may contain inaccuracies, errors, or outdated information. You are solely responsible for independently verifying any information before acting on it. HeartWise Mentor LLC expressly disclaims all responsibility for any decisions made, actions taken, or outcomes experienced based on Platform outputs.

3. No Doctor-Patient Relationship

Use of the Platform does not create a doctor-patient relationship between you and HeartWise Mentor LLC, its founder Dr. Mouzam Faroqui, or any reviewing physician associated with the Platform. Physician-reviewed content represents professional opinion within an educational context and does not constitute clinical advice, diagnosis, treatment recommendation, or a standard of care.

4. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years of age to use HeartWise. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old, that the information you provide is accurate and complete, and that you have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.

5. Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized access or use. HeartWise Mentor LLC is not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account. One account per individual; accounts are non-transferable.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, copy, or redistribute the tools, algorithms, scoring models, or content
  • Share your account credentials with others or allow access by unauthorized users
  • Submit false, misleading, defamatory, or harmful content
  • Use automated systems, bots, or scrapers to extract data from the Platform
  • Interfere with or disrupt the Platform's infrastructure, security, or other users' access
  • Use Platform outputs to develop competing products or services

Violation of these terms may result in immediate account suspension or termination without refund.

7. Subscriptions & Payments

Paid plans are billed on a recurring basis (monthly or annually, depending on the plan selected). You authorize HeartWise Mentor LLC to charge your payment method at the applicable rate until you cancel. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds are provided for partial billing periods.

The 48-hour trial provides full Core-tier access at no charge and requires no credit card. Trial access expires automatically after 48 hours. Pricing is subject to change; existing subscribers will be notified at least 30 days before any price increase takes effect on their account.

8. User-Generated Content

By submitting questions, career data, or other content to the Platform, you grant HeartWise Mentor LLC a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use, process, and store that content for the purpose of providing and improving the Service. We may use de-identified, aggregated data for research, analytics, and platform improvement. You retain ownership of your original content.

9. Intellectual Property

All content, tools, scoring frameworks, algorithms, branding, design, and other intellectual property on HeartWise are the exclusive property of HeartWise Mentor LLC. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works without explicit written permission. "HeartWise" and "HeartWise Mentor" are trademarks of HeartWise Mentor LLC.

10. Third-Party Services

The Platform integrates with third-party services including Stripe (payments), Supabase (data storage), Vercel (hosting), and AI providers. Your use of these services is subject to their respective terms and privacy policies. HeartWise Mentor LLC is not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or practices of third-party services.

11. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Platform is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that the Platform will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.

12. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, HeartWise Mentor LLC, its founders, officers, employees, agents, and affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from or related to your use of or inability to use the Platform. This includes, without limitation, damages arising from career decisions, financial outcomes, match results, contract negotiations, salary discussions, clinical decisions, or reliance on any information provided through the Platform.

In no event shall our total liability exceed the amount you paid to HeartWise Mentor LLC in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

13. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless HeartWise Mentor LLC, its founder, officers, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Platform; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any third-party rights; or (d) any decisions you make based on information obtained through the Platform.

14. Assumption of Risk & No Reliance

You expressly acknowledge and agree that:

  • All career, financial, clinical, and contractual decisions you make are your sole responsibility, regardless of any information, scores, projections, frameworks, or recommendations provided by the Platform.
  • HeartWise outputs — including competitiveness scores, match probability estimates, compensation benchmarks, contract analysis, financial projections, and career recommendations — are educational tools, not directives. They are based on generalized data and algorithms that may not reflect your specific circumstances.
  • You will not rely on any Platform output as the sole or primary basis for any significant career, financial, medical, or legal decision.
  • HeartWise Mentor LLC bears zero liability for any outcome — positive or negative — resulting from decisions you make after using the Platform, including but not limited to: match results, employment decisions, contract terms, salary negotiations, specialty choices, financial investments, clinical practice decisions, or career transitions.
  • You assume all risk associated with your use of the Platform and any actions taken based on its outputs.

This section survives termination of your account and these Terms.

15. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform ceases immediately. Sections regarding Intellectual Property, Limitation of Liability, Indemnification, Disclaimer of Warranties, and Governing Law survive termination. You may delete your account at any time from your Profile settings.

16. Dispute Resolution

Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or the Platform shall first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith informal negotiation. If unresolved after 30 days, either party may pursue resolution. You agree that any legal action shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Harris County, Texas, and you consent to the personal jurisdiction of such courts.

Class Action Waiver: You agree that any disputes will be resolved on an individual basis and that you waive any right to participate in a class action, class arbitration, or representative proceeding.

17. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas, United States, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

18. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

19. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and Disclaimer, constitute the entire agreement between you and HeartWise Mentor LLC regarding the Platform and supersede all prior agreements, understandings, and communications.

20. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time by posting the revised version on the Platform. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 15 days before taking effect. Your continued use of the Platform after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

21. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at heartwisementor@gmail.com.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 29, 2026

1. Information We Collect

Account Information: Name, email address, training stage, specialty, institution, and career goals provided during registration.

Usage Data: Questions submitted, tools used, responses received, and interaction patterns within the Platform.

Technical Data: Browser type, device information, and general location (country/region) for service optimization.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide and personalize the HeartWise service
  • To generate AI-powered strategic guidance tailored to your profile
  • To facilitate physician review of submitted questions
  • To process payments and manage subscriptions
  • To send important service updates and notifications
  • To improve the Platform through aggregated, anonymized analytics

3. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored securely using Supabase (hosted on AWS infrastructure) with encryption in transit and at rest. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. However, no system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:

  • Service Providers: Payment processing (Stripe), authentication (Supabase), and hosting (Vercel) — only as necessary to operate the Platform
  • Reviewing Physicians: Questions submitted for physician review are shared with our medical review team in a de-identified or limited-identification format
  • Legal Requirements: When required by law, court order, or to protect the rights and safety of HeartWise or its users

5. Your Rights

You may:

  • Access and update your personal information through your profile settings
  • Request deletion of your account and associated data
  • Opt out of non-essential communications
  • Export your data upon request

6. Cookies & Local Storage

HeartWise uses browser local storage to maintain your session, preferences, and cached data for performance. We do not use third-party tracking cookies. Analytics, if implemented, use anonymized, aggregated data only.

7. Children's Privacy

HeartWise is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from minors.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

Disclaimer

Last updated: March 29, 2026

Educational Purpose Only

HeartWise is an educational mentorship platform. All content — including AI-generated responses, interactive tools, financial models, competitiveness calculators, contract analysis frameworks, and career strategy builders — is provided for informational and educational purposes only.

No Doctor-Patient Relationship: Use of HeartWise does not create a doctor-patient relationship between you and any physician associated with the Platform, including Dr. Mouzam Faroqui or any reviewing physician.

No Guarantee of Outcomes: Career decisions, financial outcomes, match results, contract negotiations, and salary discussions are inherently uncertain. HeartWise provides frameworks for thinking — not guarantees of results. Past data and benchmarks (including MGMA, match rate, and compensation data) are approximations and may not reflect your specific circumstances. You bear sole responsibility for all decisions you make. HeartWise Mentor LLC accepts no liability whatsoever for outcomes resulting from your use of the Platform.

AI Limitations: AI-generated content may contain errors, outdated information, or biases. All AI outputs should be verified independently and used as starting points for discussion with qualified professionals — not as final answers.

Financial Information: Compensation data, RVU benchmarks, financial projections, and salary comparisons are estimates based on publicly available survey data. Your actual compensation will depend on your specific contract, location, practice type, and negotiation. Always consult a financial advisor and physician contract attorney for personalized guidance.

Third-Party Data: HeartWise references data from MGMA, AAMC, NRMP, and other public sources. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of third-party data. Referenced data is current as of the dates noted and may change.

Contact

For questions about these policies, account deletion requests, or data inquiries:

HeartWise Mentor LLC

Email: heartwisementor@gmail.com

Founded by: Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC

Location: Houston, Texas
